Description: Implement secure login and signup functionality
Display account balances and recent transactions
Enable users to transfer funds between accounts
Allow users to pay utility bills from their account
Send alerts and push notifications to users
As a user, I want to log in with my username and password so that I can access my account.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I have valid credentials
When I enter them and click login
Then I should be redirected to the dashboard

Description: As a new user, I want to sign up and verify my email so that I can start using the app.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I provide valid signup details
When I submit the form
Then I should receive a verification email

Description: As a user, I want to view my account balance so that I know how much money I have.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I am logged in
When I open the dashboard
Then I should see my current balance

Description: As a user, I want to see my recent transactions so that I can track my spending.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I am on the dashboard
When I scroll down
Then I should see a list of recent transactions

Description: As a user, I want to transfer funds to another account so that I can pay others.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I enter recipient and amount
When I confirm the transfer
Then the amount should be debited and confirmation shown

Description: As a user, I want to add a beneficiary so that I can transfer funds easily in the future.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I provide beneficiary details
When I save them
Then the beneficiary should be added to my list

Description: As a user, I want to pay my electricity bill so that I avoid late fees.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I select electricity provider
When I enter account number and amount
Then the bill should be paid

Description: As a user, I want to schedule bill payments so that they are paid automatically.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I choose a bill and date
When I schedule it
Then it should be paid on the selected date

Description: As a user, I want to receive alerts for transactions so that I stay informed.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given a transaction occurs
When it is processed
Then I should receive an alert

Description: As a user, I want to enable push notifications so that I get real-time updates.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I enable notifications
When an event occurs
Then I should receive a push message

Description: As a user, I want to use two-factor authentication so that my account is more secure.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given I enter my credentials
When prompted for OTP
Then I should enter it to complete login

Description: As a developer, I want to encrypt sensitive data so that it is protected.
Acceptance Criteria:
Given data is stored
When it includes sensitive info
Then it should be encrypted at rest
